title: elymus semicostatus subsp. scabridulus
intro: Elymus semicostatus subsp. scabridulus is a type of wild grass known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. It is a subspecies of the Elymus semicostatus plant, which is a perennial grass found in mountainous regions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Elymus semicostatus subsp. scabridulus include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
